name: Cross-audience foundations
when_to_use: Overall documentation system, IA, docs-as-code, style, accessibility, versioning, telemetry

name: Developer documentation
when_to_use: README, quickstart, API reference, tutorials, examples, changelogs, search/findability

name: End-user help
when_to_use: Help center, in-product help, onboarding, empty states, tooltips, microcopy, user-facing errors

name: Agent-readable documentation
when_to_use: llms.txt, AGENTS.md/SKILL.md split, retrieval-friendly structure, stable anchors, glossaries

name: API and tool contracts
when_to_use: OpenAPI/MCP/GraphQL descriptions, examples, errors, idempotency, rate limits, operational metadata

name: Audience conflicts
when_to_use: Human-vs-agent or DX-vs-UX documentation tensions where one audience's optimum harms another
